description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a circular, padded seat and backrest upholstered in smooth, dark gray material. The backrest features a large, rounded cutout in the lower center, providing both visual interest and ergonomic support. The chair is supported by a single central metal column that branches out into a five-legged star-shaped base, each leg ending in a caster wheel for mobility. The seat and backrest appear to be constructed from foam padding covered in synthetic leather or vinyl, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. There are no visible armrests or adjustment levers, emphasizing a minimalist design. The overall form is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban offices, lobbies, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, circular swivel chair with a padded seat and backrest, featuring a central cutout and a five-legged wheeled base. Upholstered in dark gray material, it has a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular padded seat and backrest with a prominent central cutout and the five-legged base with casters.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the chair's depth, the curvature of the seat, and the thickness of the padding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous backrest and the full star-shaped base with all casters visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the seat's contour and the open backrest design.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, cylindrical metal column in black, connecting the seat to the five-legged base, likely fixed and non-telescoping.
attribute_seat_back_design: Circular, padded backrest with a large central cutout, medium height, smoothly contoured, upholstered in dark gray synthetic leather.
